summary: checkpoints list must short-circuit under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY like every other CSRF-requiring command, so verify runs don't dial the live app.
reason: fetchCheckpoints calls writeHeaders -> primeCSRF, which does a live GET to mint an XSRF cookie. The client's verify-mode short-circuit only gates mutating verbs, so that read GET slips through and dials the live app during credential-less verify runs. Any hand-authored command that primes CSRF needs the IsVerifyEnv guard.
validated_outcome: PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 artistly-pp-cli checkpoints list returns exit 0 with no network dial; normal runs still list the catalog. go build/vet/test pass.
